title: Warps
description: Let players place warp signs so others can visit their islands. The easiest way to build a connected community.
body:
# 🚪 Warps — Visit Any Island

Players place a warp sign on their island, and anyone on the server can warp to it. Simple, social, and it turns isolated islands into a connected community.

## Features

- **Warp signs** — players place a sign to make their island warpable
- **Warp GUI** — browse all available warps with island previews
- **Random warp** — visit a random island for inspiration
- **Configurable** — set sign text, restrict who can create warps, and more
- **Works with all BentoBox game modes**

## Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/island warp <player>` | Warp to a player's island |
| `/island warps` | Browse all warps |

📦 Requires [BentoBox](https://modrinth.com/plugin/bentobox) + a game mode addon.
